PARENT: FACULTY redirects to /students; PARENT redirects to /my-child; GATE_KEEPER blocked from web
FACULTY = view-only; CLERK = student records access
GATE_KEEPER only - QR scan + pass code verify
HELPDESK only - ticket list + resolve + reply
All roles can attempt login; only GATE_KEEPER + HELPDESK proceed
Class-level: SA+PRIN+FAC+CLERK; no explicit guard = class-level applies

Endpoint / Feature: 1. A principal can update anything for his/her school/tenant only. Same applies to all roles except Super-Admin.
2. Super Admin must have a tenantId for all operations except School/Tenant creation
3. GATE_KEEPER role has NO web dashboard access — mobile app only (gate pass scanning)
4. HELPDESK role has both web + mobile access — can manage tickets on both platforms
5. CLERK role has web access — student records + finance (invoices/payments/receipts)
6. SCHOOL_TRUSTEE role has web access — finance oversight only
7. SCHOOL_ADMIN role removed from Finance — replaced by CLERK + SCHOOL_TRUSTEE
8. All deletions are soft deletes (mark as inactive) — no hard deletes anywhere
9. Password for all seed users: abc@123
